steps.title: Introduce the explanation
steps.content: The clause "it was not universally embraced" is followed by an explanation: some people flocked to balloon launches, while others dismissed the balloon. The punctuation must introduce that explanatory contrast.

steps.title: Reject faulty connections
steps.content: B leaves the clauses running together, C does not clearly introduce the explanatory contrast, and D produces the ungrammatical phrase "and whereas." A colon after "embraced" correctly introduces the explanation that follows. The answer is A.
